# Implementation Phases

## Phase Overview

| Phase | Period | Focus |
|---|---|---|
| Phase 1: Foundation | Jan-Jun 2025 | Setup, hiring, platform procurement |
| Phase 2: Deployment | Jul 2025-Jun 2026 | Pilot launch, member onboarding |
| Phase 3: Scale-Up | Jul 2026-Dec 2027 | Full rollout, sustainability |

## Phase 1: Foundation (6 months)
- Hire core team (CEO, CTO, CFO, field officers)
- Procure and configure core banking system
- Develop and test mobile app and USSD channel
- Establish agent network (50 agents)
- Community sensitization campaigns

## Phase 2: Deployment (12 months)
- Pilot launch in 3 target locations
- Onboard first 1,000 digital members
- Disburse first 500 digital loans
- Financial literacy workshops (20 sessions)
- Mid-term evaluation

## Phase 3: Scale-Up (18 months)
- Expand to 10 locations
- Reach 5,000 digital members
- Launch new products (insurance, investment)
- Sustainability handover plan
- Final evaluation and documentation
